title: hydrangea villosa var. strigosior
intro: Hydrangea villosa var. strigosior, also known as the rough-leaved panicle hydrangea, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea villosa var. strigosior include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
